prompt: Crop a specific photo to a square aspect ratio in Photos (Edit mode > Crop > Square). Use `cerebellum 'photos recent 1 /tmp/351-recent.txt'` to learn the name, then `cerebellum 'photos edit_crop "<name>" ~/Desktop/kinbench/351-confirm.txt'` (Photos AS dict doesn't expose Edit mode; cerebellum drives UI keystroke and writes a confirmation file).
